subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! Thy letter hath arrived. It brought joy to all hearts, for it carried the proof of thy sincere work.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
